tiktok.caption: They forgave your student loans — then the IRS sent a $21,000 bill. The phantom income trap nobody tells you about 🚨

youtube_short.title: Student Loan Forgiveness Hides a $21,000 Tax Bomb
title_alternatives: The IRS Tax Trap Inside Income-Driven Repayment Nobody Warns You About
Your Forgiven Student Loans Become a $21K Tax Bill
youtube_short.description: After 25 years of income-driven payments, 8.8 million borrowers will get their remaining student loan balance 'forgiven' — and immediately owe up to $21,000 in taxes on it. This is called phantom income: the IRS treats forgiven debt as ordinary income via Form 1099-C, even though you didn't receive a single dollar. The one exception? Public Service Loan Forgiveness is completely tax-free. For everyone else, start saving now. #studentloans #studentloanforgiveness #taxes #personalfinance Follow for daily money psychology breakdowns.

hook_line: They forgave your loans — then the IRS sent a $21,000 bill
